mapper.body: Hi {{1.caller_name}}, this is REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME. Your service call is confirmed for {{1.appointment_time}}. Our tech will call 30 min before arrival. Questions? Call us at REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_BUSINESS_PHONE.

notes.content:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Connect Twilio account
2. Connect Google Sheets account
3. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_TWILIO_NUMBER with your Twilio number
4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME with your business name
5. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_BUSINESS_PHONE with your business phone number
6. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID with your Google Sheets ID

EXPECTED WEBHOOK PAYLOAD (sent from Lead Capture or Retell):
{
  "caller_name": "John Smith",
  "callback_number": "+16025551234",
  "appointment_time": "Tomorrow at 9:00 AM"
}

HOW TO TRIGGER:
This webhook is called automatically from the Lead Capture scenario after an appointment is created in Google Calendar. You can also trigger it manually from Retell AI when a booking is confirmed during the call.
